title: {topic} — Everything You Need in 30 Seconds
description: The essentials of {topic}, condensed into 30 seconds. Stick around for the last tip.
hook: You are missing out if you don't know this.

segments.text: You are missing out if you don't know this.
Today we break down a topic everyone asks about, in just thirty seconds.
First, the basics. Master the fundamentals and you are halfway there.
Second, consistency. Ten minutes a day is all it takes.
If this helped, hit like and subscribe!
